news.title: Millions of Aussies to have their private health insurance rebates slashed
news.snippet: A Howard-era decision to increase private health insurance subsidies for over-65s will be scrapped to help pay for elderly support services.

news.title: NDIS slashed and higher health insurance subsidy for over-65s scrapped, in Health Minister Butler’s package
news.snippet: The government will slash spending in real terms on the National Disability Insurance Scheme over four years, as it undertakes a massive “reset” of the...

news.title: Showers free in aged care reform as health rebate cut
news.snippet: Over-65s will lose a generous private health insurance rebate to help fund at-home support services for aged care recipients after a government backflip.

news.title: Over-65s’ private health rebate slashed to fund aged care beds
news.snippet: Federal Health Minister Mark Butler will scrap the higher private health insurance subsidy for people aged over 65 and spend the proceeds on 5000 new aged...

news.title: Private health subsidy for over-65s to be scrapped
news.snippet: A subsidy for private health cover for older Australians is set to be scrapped as part of a massive overhaul of the NDIS.

news.title: What does the National Disability Insurance Scheme overhaul mean for you?
